data.content: Polished `foolery --help` with a clearer command palette: lifecycle commands are green, setup/update commands blue, diagnostics/help yellow, and destructive commands red, with dimmed descriptions when color is enabled. Added FORCE_COLOR support so help styling can be exercised without a TTY, and added src/lib/__tests__/help-cli.test.ts to cover both plain-text and ANSI-colored output. Quality gates: bun run lint (118 pre-existing warnings, 0 errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (2012 passed, 11 skipped, 42 todo), bun run build (success). Feature branch: work/foolery-76ec-impl. Feature commit: 3b1290788d0b.
